summary: Iteration 26 testing complete. CRITICAL FIX APPLIED: Sidebar text visibility issue fixed by adding !important to CSS color rules. All sidebar navigation links now work correctly. Reports filters and PDF download working. POS screen shows categories and products. Mobile responsiveness verified.

minor.issue: Endpoint is /api/audit/logs not /api/audit - test file needs update

issues: Console warning: Chart width/height -1 - recharts container sizing issue (non-blocking, visual only)

critical_code_review_comments: SIDEBAR TEXT VISIBILITY FIX: Added !important to .sidebar-link color rules in index.css to override Tailwind's hsl(var(--foreground)) which was setting dark text color
Root cause: Tailwind base styles were overriding the custom .sidebar-link color with hsl(var(--foreground)) = rgb(15, 23, 41) which is nearly invisible on dark sidebar background
Fix applied: color: #E2E8F0 !important for inactive links, color: #FFFFFF !important for hover and active states

success_rate.backend: 95% (21/22 passed, 1 failed due to wrong endpoint path in test)

context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 26 testing complete. CRITICAL CSS FIX APPLIED: Sidebar link text was nearly invisible due to Tailwind's hsl(var(--foreground)) overriding custom color. Fixed by adding !important to color rules in index.css. All features verified working: sidebar navigation (all 11 links for restaurant admin), reports filters (Today/7Days/30Days/90Days all change data), PDF download, POS screen with 5 categories and 12 products, QR menu public access, mobile responsiveness at 375px, platform owner dashboard and restaurant management.
